posts.caption:
Apple Intelligence is now live in China — made possible by a partnership with Alibaba's Qwen AI model, which cleared China's regulatory approval process. The feature rolls out across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS, giving Apple a foothold in one of its most critical markets.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AppleIntelligence #Apple #Alibaba #AINews #TechNews #ArtificialIntelligence

story.title: Apple Intelligence launches in China via Alibaba Qwen partnership
story.dek: China's regulator approved Apple Intelligence by integrating Alibaba's Qwen AI model into iOS, iPadOS, macOS, and visionOS, marking Apple's major expansion into a key market.

posts.caption:
Reelful is a new iOS app that pulls photos and clips straight from your camera roll and uses AI to edit them into finished short-form videos — no timeline, no manual cuts. It's aimed at people who want TikTok- and Reels-ready content without learning traditional editing tools.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIVideo #ShortFormVideo #ReelfulApp #VideoEditing #AITools #TikTok

story.title: Reelful automates short-form video creation from camera roll photos
story.dek: New iOS app uses AI to turn photos and clips into polished TikTok and Instagram Reels, targeting users who find traditional editing tools too complex.

posts.caption:
Hugging Face just dropped Real World VoiceEQ, a new benchmark designed to measure how humans actually perceive voice AI output — not just what the numbers say.

Most existing metrics miss the subjective feel of synthesized speech. VoiceEQ pushes evaluation closer to real listener experience, which matters a lot as voice AI quality races ahead.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#HuggingFace #VoiceAI #AIBenchmark #SpeechAI #GenerativeAI

story.title: Hugging Face releases Real World VoiceEQ benchmark for voice AI quality
story.dek: New metric measures human perception of voice AI output, advancing evaluation beyond specialized metrics as voice AI capabilities accelerate.

posts.caption:
OpenAI just dropped a $230 mechanical keyboard — actual hardware, not software. Built with Work Louder, it has customizable keys and a physical dial that controls your AI coding agent's reasoning level, with status lights that show what the agent is doing in real time.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#OpenAI #AITools #Codex #MechanicalKeyboard #AIAgents #DeveloperTools

story.title: OpenAI releases $230 Codex keyboard with AI agent status lights
story.dek: OpenAI entered hardware with a specialty keyboard co-designed with Work Louder, featuring customizable keys and a reasoning-level dial for managing AI coding agents.

posts.caption:
Typing a prompt isn't the skill anymore — it hasn't been for a while. The AI artists pulling ahead aren't better at describing things, they're better at directing: making decisions about light, composition, intent, and iteration the way a filmmaker does, not a search engine user. The craft moved. Most people didn't.

Full story + today's brief: link in bio.

#AIart #generativeAI #AIcreators #digitalart #creativeAI

story.title: The Best AI Artists Aren't Prompting. They're Directing.
story.dek: Everyone with a browser can type a prompt. That stopped being impressive about five minutes after Midjourney launched. The real skill gap has moved somewhere else entirely.
